title: Whimscape Variated Villagers
description: An unofficial add-on for Whimscape that brings some skin tone variants to Villagers!
body: ### **Tired of all your villagers looking the same?** ![Villager Variety](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14a0d3ffb9ddf46647812b1018e3f9f093f90502.png) This resource pack adds some skin tone variants to the Villagers of [Whimscape!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) **• Requires [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** **★ Special Thanks to [Kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) for making Whimscape! ★**
